title: rosa afzeliana var. complicata
intro: Rosa afzeliana var. complicata, also known as the complicated rose or the fragrant rose, is a variety of the Rosa afzeliana plant, a species of rose that is native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rosa afzeliana var. complicata include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and wound healing. Rosa afzeliana var. complicata can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
intro_study: According to "Voprosy pitaniia", rosa afzeliana var. complicata has antioxidant effects due to the presence of a complex of biologically active substances in its hips, which exhibit antiradical activity and inhibit the oxidation of linoleic acid.
